report.summary: Standup v9 Apr 3: BTC flat at ~$66,503 (-0.5% from v8's $66,868), ETH ~$2,055 (unchanged). F&G holds at 9 — Extreme Fear day 8+. Morgan Stanley filing MSBT ETF at 0.14% fee (lowest-cost). April 1 ETF outflows $173.7M. Since v8: community-v7 + eod-v7 + eod-v8 ran. 29 agent runs today = ~$2,012 human-equiv. Deploy debt 18th escalation.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE LAST STANDUP (v8 → v9): BTC essentially flat — drifted from $66,868 to ~$66,503 (-0.5%). The relief rally reversal noted in v8 has stabilized into a low-volatility grind near $66.5K support. ETH unchanged at ~$2,055. Market in consolidation mode after yesterday's selloff.

F&G INDEX: Holds at 9 — Extreme Fear. No change from v8. Now in sub-10 territory for 8+ consecutive days. Historically this level has preceded major accumulation phases within 30-90 days. Our fear & greed tool page remains maximally relevant — IF deployed.

BTC ETF FLOWS UPDATE: April 1 saw $173.7M net outflows — IBIT led with -$86.5M, FBTC followed at -$78.6M. ETH ETFs lost $7.1M same day. March closed at +$1.32B net inflows but final week flipped red at -$296M. Institutional appetite cooling into Q2.

MORGAN STANLEY MSBT ETF: Filed Amendment No. 4 to S-1 on April 1. Will list on NYSE Arca under ticker MSBT at 0.14% annual fee — undercutting BlackRock's IBIT (0.25%). This is a major institutional signal: traditional wealth management entering BTC ETF space with competitive pricing. Content opportunity: 'Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF: What You Need to Know' guide.
CONTENT ON DISK: 311 learn page dirs (cryptodegen) + 78 page.tsx (Degen0x). No new pages built since v8. All content remains uncommitted and invisible to Google.
SINCE v8: 3 agent runs — community-v7 (09:48 UTC), eod-v7 (09:53 UTC), eod-v8 (10:55 UTC). No build or design agents this cycle.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: LAST CYCLE ACTIVITY (v8 → v9): 3 agent runs — community-v7 (social content), eod-v7 + eod-v8 (QA cycle-close passes). No build, design, or deploy agents ran. Standup v9 = this cycle.

TODAY'S FULL AGENT ACTIVITY: 29 runs across 5 types — standup×9 ($405), build×3 ($699), design×3 ($180), community×7 ($287), eod×8 ($504). Total human-equiv: ~$2,012. Publish-deploy agent: 0 runs today. 0 runs all-time.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (18TH CONSECUTIVE ESCALATION): Deploy debt now at 18th escalation with zero movement. BTC consolidating near $66.5K in extreme fear. Search demand for crisis/DCA/fear content at multi-year highs. 311+ learn pages, tools, and guides sitting uncommitted. Every hour = permanent organic traffic loss. JEFE ACTION REQUIRED.

P0 — MORGAN STANLEY MSBT CONTENT GAP: Morgan Stanley filing the lowest-cost BTC ETF is a major news cycle. We have zero content about it. Competitors will rank for 'Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF' queries within 24-48 hours. Build + deploy a guide page immediately.
P1 — PHANTOM PUBLISHED PAGES: 111 slugs in published-pages.ts with no page.tsx on disk. Will 404 if deployed. Unchanged from v8.
P2 — API RESILIENCE: 0/6 public routes with rate limiting. 4/6 routes with no fallback data. Unchanged 18+ cycles.
P3 — 141 TS ERRORS: In structured-data.examples.ts + 3 learn pages. Non-blocking. Unchanged.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0 CRITICAL — 18TH ESCALATION): Nothing has changed. F&G at 9, BTC grinding $66.5K, extreme fear search queries peaking. One git commit + Vercel push = $0 cost, unlocks weeks of content to Google. This remains the single highest-ROI action. JEFE MUST ACT.

PRIORITY 2 — MORGAN STANLEY MSBT ETF CONTENT: Time-sensitive content opportunity. Morgan Stanley's 0.14% fee ETF filing is breaking news. Target keywords: 'Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF', 'MSBT ETF', 'cheapest Bitcoin ETF'. Build a compare page (MSBT vs IBIT vs FBTC) + learn guide. First-mover SEO advantage window is 24-48 hours.

PRIORITY 3 — EXTREME FEAR ACCUMULATION GUIDE: F&G sub-10 for 8+ days = historically rare. Create urgency content: 'Bitcoin Fear Index at 9 — Historical Analysis', 'How to DCA During Extreme Fear', 'Is This the Bottom? What F&G Below 10 Means'. These queries are being searched RIGHT NOW. Deploy same cycle for maximum impact.

metrics.label: 💰 Actual Cost — Today's Sprint
metrics.value: $2,012 (29 runs: standup×9 $405 + build×3 $699 + design×3 $180 + community×7 $287 + eod×8 $504)
